title: Semiconductor devices
abstract: In an embodiment, a structure includes: a gate stack over a channel region of a substrate; a source/drain region adjacent the channel region; a first inter-layer dielectric (ILD) layer over the source/drain region; a silicide between the first ILD layer and the source/drain region, the silicide contacting a top surface of the source/drain region and a bottom surface of the source/drain region; and a first source/drain contact having a first portion and a second portion, the first portion of the first source/drain contact disposed between the silicide and the first ILD layer, the second portion of the first source/drain contact extending through the first ILD layer and contacting the silicide.
claims: 1. A device comprising: a channel region; a source/drain region adjacent the channel region; an inter-layer dielectric over the source/drain region; a silicide between the inter-layer dielectric and the source/drain region, the silicide contacting an upper facet of the source/drain region and a lower facet of the source/drain region; a source/drain contact having a first portion in contact with the silicide and having a second portion extending through the inter-layer dielectric, the first portion of the source/drain contact disposed between the silicide and the inter-layer dielectric; and a void exposing the upper facet of the source/drain region or the lower facet of the source/drain region.
